summary: Commission Engine & Track Order UX testing complete. Backend API /api/admin/commission/calculate verified (9/9 commission tests passed). Track Order UI verified with radio selector pattern (Phone/Reference/Email). Settings Hub Performance Targets tab was missing min_rating_threshold and rating_weight_in_kpi_pct fields - FIXED by adding new 'Rating & Quality Metrics' section.

minor.issue: Rate limiting prevented full verification of wallet/performance settings via API (403 after multiple login attempts)

success_rate.backend: 86% (12/14 tests passed - 2 failed due to rate limiting)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Commission engine at /api/admin/commission/calculate fully tested. Track Order UI uses radio selector (trackMethod state) with Phone/Reference/Email options. Settings Hub Performance Targets tab now includes min_rating_threshold and rating_weight_in_kpi_pct fields in new 'Rating & Quality Metrics' section. Rate limiting is aggressive (5 failed attempts triggers lockout) - use session reuse in tests.

details: POST /api/admin/commission/calculate returns 200 with valid payload
Direct channel: sales_allocation = 15% of margin (3000 for 20000 margin)
Assisted channel: sales_allocation = 10% of margin (2000 for 20000 margin)
Affiliate channel: affiliate_allocation = 10%, sales_support = 5% (1000 for 20000 margin)
Referral channel: referral_allocation = 10%, NO sales, NO affiliate
Group deal channel: all individual allocations = 0
Wallet max respects flexible margin (promotion_reserve + remaining)
Invalid channel returns 400 with error message
Zero margin returns zero allocations
Zero/negative selling_price returns 400
GET /api/public/group-deals/track?phone=X returns list
GET /api/public/group-deals/track?ref=GDC-X returns list
GET /api/orders/track/ORD-X returns order or 404
Page renders at /track-order with data-testid='track-order-page'
Radio selector with Phone (default), Reference, Email options
Only ONE input visible at a time based on trackMethod state
Phone input visible by default
Reference input visible when Reference button clicked
Email input visible when Email button clicked
Submit button with data-testid='track-submit-btn'
wallet_enabled toggle in CommercialTab (line 395)
max_wallet_per_order field in CommercialTab (line 394)
protect_allocations toggle in CommercialTab (line 398)
enforce_single_channel toggle in CommercialTab (line 399)
API verification blocked by rate limiting
min_rating_threshold was MISSING from UI - ADDED
rating_weight_in_kpi_pct was MISSING from UI - ADDED
New 'Rating & Quality Metrics' section added to PerformanceTargetsTab
Fields now editable with proper min/max constraints

fixes_applied.description: Added 'Rating & Quality Metrics' section to PerformanceTargetsTab with min_rating_threshold and rating_weight_in_kpi_pct fields

rate_limiting_note: Backend has aggressive rate limiting (5 failed login attempts triggers lockout). Settings Hub API tests failed with 403 due to rate limiting from previous test runs. The wallet and performance settings exist in code and defaults - just couldn't verify via API.
